name: Ganesh Mali
text: FCT Interview Master is platform the entire interview management process. From interviewer creation and student slot booking to automatic attendance marking, remarks, certificate generation, and email notifications — everything is handled seamlessly. It significantly reduces manual workload for mentors and HR teams.

name: Swati Zampal
text: Terra AI is a powerful one-click cloud infrastructure builder. With a single click it automatically creates and deploys cloud environments, pushes configurations to GitHub, and provisions AWS resources. It reduces up to 95% of manual DevOps workload and eliminates complex coding, making infrastructure deployment faster and smarter.

name: Asha Kadam
text: Working with this team was a great experience. They built a complete website and admin panel for my saree shop, making it very easy for me to manage products and my online store. Whenever I requested changes, they quickly updated everything as per my needs. I’m very happy with the service and highly recommend them.
